rawContent:
Tweet by @fofrAI (fofr)
Author bio: Playing with models at Google DeepMind
Text: I got tired of reading badly formatted agent written reports, so I put together a writing skill derived from the GOVUK style guide and content design principles:

https://t.co/M4okduKGP6

Content is a little out of date, but here you can see the effect of the skill: https://t.co/X1OgcWWreX
